title: AN ACT DECLARING THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAUBAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, A PERMANENT SUBPORT.

chunks.text:
H. No. 43 / 65 OG No. 50, 13814 (December 15, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5658, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAUBAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, A PERMANENT SUBPORT.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipality of Mauban, Province of Quezon, is hereby declared a permanent subport.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
